title: Ragdoll Action: Press "Ragdoll Action" to toggle the ragdoll state on or off.

title: Gait Actions Type 1: Press "Walk Action" to toggle walking/running, hold "Sprint Action" to sprint.
comment: Gait Actions Type 1: Press "Walk Action" to toggle walking/running, hold "Sprint Action" to sprint.
terms: Gait Actions Type 1: Press "Walk Action" to toggle walking/running, hold "Sprint Action" to sprint.

title: Gait Action Type 2 (Unused): Hold "Sprint Action" to run, double tap and hold to sprint.
comment: Gait Action Type 2 (Unused): Hold "Sprint Action" to run, double tap and hold to sprint.
terms: Gait Action Type 2 (Unused): Hold "Sprint Action" to run, double tap and hold to sprint.

title: Calculate the Acceleration by comparing the current and previous velocity. The Current Acceleration returned by the movement component equals the input acceleration, and does not represent the actual physical accelration of the character.

Get Float Value

Get Float Value

title: Calculate the rotation rate by using the current Rotation Rate Curve in the Movement Settings. Using the curve in conjunction with the mapped speed gives you a high level of control over the rotation rates for each speed. Increase the speed if the camera is rotating quickly for more responsive rotation.
comment: Calculate the rotation rate by using the current Rotation Rate Curve in the Movement Settings. Using the curve in conjunction with the mapped speed gives you a high level of control over the rotation rates for each speed. Increase the speed if the camera is rotating quickly for more responsive rotation.

title: Determine if the character is currently able to sprint based on the Rotation mode and current acceleration (input) rotation. If the character is in the Looking Rotation mode, only allow sprinting if there is full movement input and it is faced forward relative to the camera + or - 50 degrees.
comment: Determine if the character is currently able to sprint based on the Rotation mode and current acceleration (input) rotation. If the character is in the Looking Rotation mode, only allow sprinting if there is full movement input and it is faced forward relative to the camera + or - 50 degrees.
